name: Spaghetti Carbonara
steps: Boil spaghetti until al dente.
Fry pancetta until crispy.
Mix eggs and parmesan in a bowl.
Combine hot pasta with pancetta, remove from heat, add egg mixture.
Toss quickly and serve immediately.

name: Tomato Basil Penne
steps: Cook penne according to package directions.
Sauté garlic in olive oil until fragrant.
Add tomatoes and simmer 10 minutes.
Toss pasta with sauce, fold in basil, season with salt.

name: Mushroom Risotto
steps: Sauté mushrooms and onion in butter.
Toast rice briefly, deglaze with wine.
Add warm stock gradually, stirring until creamy.
Stir in parmesan and adjust salt.

name: Minestrone Soup
steps: Sauté onion, celery, and carrots in olive oil.
Add garlic, then tomatoes and stock.
Simmer until vegetables are tender, add beans.
Season with salt and serve hot.

name: Lentil Soup
steps: Sauté onion and carrots in olive oil.
Add lentils, cumin, and water or stock.
Simmer until lentils break down.
Season with salt and a squeeze of lemon.

name: Greek Salad
steps: Chop cucumber and tomatoes.
Combine with olives and crumbled feta.
Dress with olive oil, oregano, and a pinch of salt.
Toss gently and serve chilled.

name: Caprese Salad
steps: Slice mozzarella and tomatoes.
Layer with basil leaves on a platter.
Drizzle olive oil and balsamic, finish with salt.

name: Chocolate Brownies
steps: Melt butter with chocolate.
Whisk eggs and sugar, combine with chocolate mixture.
Fold in flour, salt, and vanilla.
Bake until set with a fudgy center.

name: Lemon Tart
steps: Blind bake a shortcrust shell with butter and flour.
Cook lemon curd with eggs, sugar, and juice.
Fill tart, chill until set, garnish if desired.

name: Vegetable Omelette
steps: Beat eggs with a pinch of salt.
Sauté pepper and onion in butter.
Pour eggs over, cook gently, add cheese, fold.

name: Avocado Toast
steps: Toast bread until crisp.
Mash avocado with lemon and salt.
Top toast with avocado and a fried egg, sprinkle chili flakes.

name: Garlic Butter Shrimp
steps: Pat shrimp dry and season lightly with salt.
Sauté garlic in olive oil and butter.
Cook shrimp until pink, finish with lemon and parsley.
